title: Filter Engineering Employees
description: Retrieve the name and salary of all employees who work in the 'Engineering' department.
reference_query: SELECT name, salary FROM employees WHERE department = 'Engineering'
hints: Use a WHERE clause to filter rows by department.
String values in SQL must be wrapped in single quotes.
Only select the 'name' and 'salary' columns — not all columns.
explanation: The WHERE clause filters rows before they are returned. String comparisons use single quotes in SQL.
